name: golang-go.uber-atomic-dev
title: golang-go.uber-atomic-dev
summary: Simple wrappers for primitive types to enforce atomic access
description:
Simple wrappers for primitive types to enforce atomic access
The standard library's `sync/atomic` is powerful, but it's easy to forget which
variables must be accessed atomically. `go.uber.org/atomic` preserves all the
functionality of the standard library, but wraps the primitive types to
provide a safer, more convenient API.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-go.uber-atomic-dev because Simple wrappers for primitive types to enforce atomic access.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-go.uber-atomic-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-go.uber-atomic-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-go.uber-atomic-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
